steps.title: Introduce the period list
steps.content: The words before the blank form a complete clause ending with "three primary periods." The words after the blank list those periods: the Old Kingdom, the Middle Kingdom, and the New Kingdom.

steps.title: Reject wrong list boundaries
steps.content: A makes the listed period names into a fragment. B uses a semicolon before material that is not an independent clause. D uses a comma where a formal list needs stronger introduction. A colon correctly introduces the list. The answer is C.
